summary: 欢迎来到 OpenST 档案馆，这是你的第一步。
searchText: # 欢迎 这就是正文内容了。 ```python import os import json from flask import Blueprint, render_template, request, redirect, url_for, flash main_bp = Blueprint("main", __name__) DATA_DIR_VIP = "data/vip" DATA_DIR_NONVIP = "data/non-vip" def get_user_path(name): for folder in [DATA_DIR_VIP, DATA_DIR_NONVIP]: path = os.path.join(folder, f"{name}.plist") if os.path.exists(path): return path return None # ·········更多不举例 ``` | 姓名 | 年龄 | 城市
